source: City of Toronto — All Ferry Schedules (April 2026 PDF); https://www.toronto.ca/explore-enjoy/parks-gardens-beaches/toronto-island-park/toronto-island-ferry-service/

seasons.name: Spring
seasons.note: Centre Island and Hanlan's Point operate on a Beltline schedule (single ferry serves both) between 8:30 a.m. and 9:15 p.m.

seasons.name: Fall
seasons.note: 2026 fall schedule not yet published; using 2025 fall schedule as placeholder.
